  +-------------+
  |             |
  | +--------+  |
  | |  Read  |  |
  | +----+---+  |
  |      |      |
  |      v      |
  | +---------+ |
  | |  Parse  | |
  | +----+----+ |
  |      |      |
  +------+------+
         |
         |
+--------+-------+
|        v       |
| +------------+ |
| |  Validate  | |
| +------+-----+ |
|        |       |
|        v       |
|  +-----------+ |
|  |  Convert  | |
|  +-----+-----+ |
|        |       |
+--------+-------+
         |
         |
 +-------+------+
 |       v      |
 | +----------+ |
 | |  Format  | |
 | +-----+----+ |
 |       |      |
 |       v      |
 |  +---------+ |
 |  |  Write  | |
 |  +---------+ |
 |              |
 +--------------+
